ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-19-2002 CONTINUED TO NOV-18-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) LINDA F JORDAN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER VACATING SANCTIONS
RESPONSE TO OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAVIS, DENISE
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-18-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF DENISE TRAVIS RECIVED BY THE COURT IN LETTER DATED 10/10/02, THE COURT ORDERED HER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE FILE FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANCIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR PLAINTIFFS CORDELIA JOHNSON AND LEE JOHNSONS' FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. THEREFORE, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THEIR CASE BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: FLOYD BUTTLER, CSR#2518. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-24-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST DENISE TRAVIS, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-24-2002, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-10-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: BELDON YEE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. At the request of plaintiff Denise Travis recived by the court in letter dated 10/10/02, the Court ordered her case dismissed without prejudice. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiffs Cordelia Johnson and Lee Johnsons' failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that their case be dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Reported by: Floyd Buttler, CSR#2518. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2002 Continued To Nov-18-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Kim Denise Travis, appearing in Propria Persona. Appearance for defendant City and County of San Francisco. Each Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. Sanctions previously imposed against Denise Travis are ordered vacated. The OSC is ordered re-set to 11/18/2002 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Maura Balcocchi. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2002 Continued To Aug-19-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/19/2002 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee. (212)
